hero.tagline: Smart diagnostics for circuits. No guessing.
hero.subtitle: EVAAH combines computer vision, real-time electrical monitoring and generative AI so any technician can diagnose PCBs in seconds.

stat3.label: That combine vision + portable electrical monitoring

step1.title: Connect the module
step1.desc: Connect the EVAAH hardware to the circuit using precision pogo pin probes.

step2.title: Take a photo
step2.desc: ARGOS identifies components on-device without internet.

step3.title: Get the diagnosis
step3.desc: AI analyzes data and delivers contextual recommendations in seconds.

f1.title: ARGOS Vision
f1.desc: On-device component detection without internet using YOLOv8n.

f2.title: Real-time monitoring
f2.desc: Continuous voltage, current, temperature and vibration.

f3.title: AI with real context
f3.desc: RAG: the LLM knows your specific circuit.

faqItems.a: Yes, the EVAAH app is included in all packages at no extra cost.
The ARGOS model runs on-device. Basic monitoring works offline; cloud features require internet.

faqItems.q: How long does hardware shipping take?
faqItems.a: Shipping across Mexico in 3-7 business days.

faqItems.q: Can I upgrade my plan later?
faqItems.a: Yes, you can migrate from Direct Kit to B2B Cloud at any time.
